title: Aether's Texture Tweaks
description: This simple resource pack fixes the connected textures of the Aether mod for once and for all, as well adds useful features like emissive textures for ores.
body:
Enhance your Aether mod experience with seamless connected textures! This resource pack fixes and improves the visual transitions between the quicksoil glass and the skyroot bookshelf blocks in your Minecraft world, providing a much cleaner gameplay.

As well as adding useful tweaks like emissive textures for all three ores that can be found in the Aether.

### Important notice:
Since this a CTM and emissive textures pack requires that **Optifine** is installed in your **Forge** loader to work
